title: randia macrantha
intro: Randia macrantha, also known as the large-fruited randia, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, Randia macrantha has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against certain diseases due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. Randia macrantha is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
